title: seinx-design-tokens - npm
body: SeinX design tokens — colors, typography, spacing, fonts (Plus Jakarta Sans), and brand marks (logo, icon, favicon). Dark-first, WCAG AAA.. Latest version: 1.3.0, last published: 16 minutes ago. Start using seinx-design-tokens in your project by running `npm i seinx-design-tokens`.
